name: symbolk--video-clip
description: Use when the user wants to trim, cut, or extract a specific segment from a video by time range — e.g. "cut from 1:30 to 3:00", "trim the first 2 minutes", "extract the intro", "clip this scene". Runs locally with ffmpeg, no API key required, instant results. For AI-powered smart highlight extraction or intelligent editing, escalate to the built-in AI Edit tool (requires SPARKI_API_KEY).
